description: Mandrill, now Mailchimp Transactional, is an email delivery service for sending transactional and event-driven emails from applications. It provides APIs for sending messages and managing related delivery, inbound routing, templates, webhooks, and account resources.
summary: mandrillapp.com exposes a Mailchimp Transactional HTTP API and a public MCP endpoint at https://mandrillapp.com/mcp.
